title: Paper Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Yomiko2.jpg|right|400px]]

==Summary==
The ability to '''create and/or manipulate paper''' in various ways. Can be used to create barriers out of condensed layers of paper, fold paper telekinetically, turning one's body into paper, throwing origami-based projectiles, etc.
